task_yaml.task:
We just wrapped our Q3 Platform Planning Sync — about forty minutes,
five people, eight agenda items — and I need proper minutes before the
decisions fade. The recording is at
/tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/meeting.mp4 and the slides we walked
through are in /tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/slides/. Transcribe
with the workspace's speech-to-text skill, pull key frames using
the video frame extraction skill, and use the video editing skill for any clip
extraction. I want a structured minutes file at
/tmp_workspace/results/minutes.md.

The five people on the call were Alice running it, plus Bob, Carol,
David, and Erin. We got through eight agenda items, ranging from short
status updates to debates that ran several minutes. I want one section
per topic with HH:MM:SS start and end timestamps, two to four bullets
summarizing what was actually said, and a thumbnail key frame saved
under /tmp_workspace/results/thumbs/ that the section references.

At the bottom, one Action Items block listing every commitment with
the owner's name and the specific due date, plus a short Open
Questions block for anything we deferred. Several decisions hinge
on specific calendar dates we said out loud during the meeting, so
please make sure those exact dates land in the minutes verbatim
rather than rounded to "next quarter".

The minutes should clearly cover what topics came up, the decisions
we landed on, the action items with their owners and due dates, and
any upstream or downstream dependencies that came up. The
per-section bullets are fine for capturing this, I just want each
thread visible somewhere in minutes.md rather than dropped on the
floor.
